hawkish_phrases: stronger than expected take-up of the Coronavirus Job Retention Scheme
it is difficult to make a clear inference from that about the recovery thereafter
one member dissented from the £100bn increase decision
dovish_phrases: CPI inflation fell further in May, to 0.5%
There is a risk of higher and more persistent unemployment in the United Kingdom
CPI inflation is well below the 2% target and is expected to fall further below it in coming quarters
a further easing of monetary policy is warranted to meet its statutory objectives
stands ready to take further action as necessary to support the economy
summary: The MPC voted 8-1 to increase asset purchases by an additional £100 billion while maintaining Bank Rate at 0.1%, with strong dovish emphasis on below-target inflation, labour market weakness, and readiness for further easing.
